name: Google Shape;17;p1
text:
How Promo supports Sales and business growth through better targeting,
cost control, measurable tracking, and execution discipline.
textPreview: How Promo supports Sales and business growth through better targeting, | cost control, measurable tracking, and execution discipline.

text: Frame: Promo moved under Sales — this session is about how Promo contributes to business outcomes, not just task execution. Three goals: increase promotion effectiveness, decrease promo cost, increase revenue.

name: Google Shape;34;p2
text: From execution support to business partner
textPreview: From execution support to business partner

name: Google Shape;36;p2
text: Beyond request execution.  Promo can help Sales improve campaign effectiveness — the right offer, to the right player, at the right time and channel.
textPreview: Beyond request execution.  Promo can help Sales improve campaign effectiveness — the right offer, to the right player, at the right time ...

name: Google Shape;38;p2
text: Reduce waste.  Better QC, cap reviews, duplicate cleanup, and abuse control can cut bonus cost and overhead without cutting campaign volume.
textPreview: Reduce waste.  Better QC, cap reviews, duplicate cleanup, and abuse control can cut bonus cost and overhead without cutting campaign volume.

name: Google Shape;40;p2
text: Support revenue growth.  Improve reactivation, enable segmentation, support cross-product offers, and build the tracking needed to validate what works.
textPreview: Support revenue growth.  Improve reactivation, enable segmentation, support cross-product offers, and build the tracking needed to valida...

name: Google Shape;42;p2
text: Control before scale.  Automation is useful, but June showed that QC, SOP, and dashboard visibility must be strengthened before full scaling.
textPreview: Control before scale.  Automation is useful, but June showed that QC, SOP, and dashboard visibility must be strengthened before full scal...

name: Google Shape;44;p2
text: A measurable operating system.  Request quality → setup accuracy → campaign performance → cost and revenue review. This framework sets out how we get there.
textPreview: A measurable operating system.  Request quality → setup accuracy → campaign performance → cost and revenue review. This framework sets ou...

name: Google Shape;46;p2
text: On June:  positioned as automation stabilisation and control-building. Issues surfaced gaps in QC, exception tracking, and legacy records — cleanup is underway (WS1 dedupe, QC checklists, SOP documentation).
textPreview: On June:  positioned as automation stabilisation and control-building. Issues surfaced gaps in QC, exception tracking, and legacy records...

text: Five-point story: broader role, less waste, revenue support, control before scale, and a measurable operating system. Be honest on June — it was the trigger to strengthen controls, and cleanup is already underway.

name: Google Shape;54;p3
text: Three business goals, one operating model
textPreview: Three business goals, one operating model

name: Google Shape;58;p3
text: Right player, right offer, right time and channel.
textPreview: Right player, right offer, right time and channel.

name: Google Shape;72;p3
text: Measured by  Claim rate · channel performance · request completeness
textPreview: Measured by  Claim rate · channel performance · request completeness

name: Google Shape;76;p3
text: Cut bonus waste, leakage, duplicates, and maintenance.
textPreview: Cut bonus waste, leakage, duplicates, and maintenance.

name: Google Shape;90;p3
text: Measured by  Bonus cost · cap vs deposit · QC error log
textPreview: Measured by  Bonus cost · cap vs deposit · QC error log

name: Google Shape;94;p3
text: From promo creation support to revenue enablement.
textPreview: From promo creation support to revenue enablement.

name: Google Shape;108;p3
text: Measured by  Promo → claim → deposit · 24/72h · cost per reactivation
textPreview: Measured by  Promo → claim → deposit · 24/72h · cost per reactivation

text: One slide view of the whole framework. Goal A = effectiveness, Goal B = cost, Goal C = revenue. Each pillar has practical actions and a measurement basis — nothing here is theoretical.

name: Google Shape;122;p4
text: Required fields — objective, segment, timing, reward logic — before Promo proceeds. Incomplete briefs are returned for clarification.
textPreview: Required fields — objective, segment, timing, reward logic — before Promo proceeds. Incomplete briefs are returned for clarification.

name: Google Shape;125;p4
text: % complete first-pass · clarification loops · turnaround time
textPreview: % complete first-pass · clarification loops · turnaround time

name: Google Shape;130;p4
text: Sales provides the target segment; Promo matches bonus mechanics and channel to that audience.
textPreview: Sales provides the target segment; Promo matches bonus mechanics and channel to that audience.

name: Google Shape;133;p4
text: Claim rate by segment · deposit conversion · response rate
textPreview: Claim rate by segment · deposit conversion · response rate

name: Google Shape;138;p4
text: Scheduled win-back Free Credit for 30-day lapsed players, from a monthly Sales export.
textPreview: Scheduled win-back Free Credit for 30-day lapsed players, from a monthly Sales export.

name: Google Shape;141;p4
text: Reactivated players · deposit within 14 days · cost per reactivation
textPreview: Reactivated players · deposit within 14 days · cost per reactivation

name: Google Shape;146;p4
text: Compare max bonus cap vs average claimant deposit; flag promos where cap exceeds 2× average.
textPreview: Compare max bonus cap vs average claimant deposit; flag promos where cap exceeds 2× average.

name: Google Shape;149;p4
text: Bonus cost saved · cap utilisation · deposit impact after change
textPreview: Bonus cost saved · cap utilisation · deposit impact after change

name: Google Shape;154;p4
text: Monthly review to retire low-uptake, duplicate, or risky promos — with management sign-off.
textPreview: Monthly review to retire low-uptake, duplicate, or risky promos — with management sign-off.

name: Google Shape;157;p4
text: Promos retired · duplicates reduced · T&C issues cleared
textPreview: Promos retired · duplicates reduced · T&C issues cleared

text: Initiatives 1–5: quality gate, segmentation, reactivation, cap audit, sunset list. Note the effort/impact balance — most are low effort. Metrics are defined upfront for every initiative.

name: Google Shape;171;p5
text: Flag bonus-heavy, low-retention players; exclude from campaigns or shift to lower-bonus mechanics.
textPreview: Flag bonus-heavy, low-retention players; exclude from campaigns or shift to lower-bonus mechanics.

name: Google Shape;174;p5
text: Bonus cost reduced · repeat abuse cases · retention after claim
textPreview: Bonus cost reduced · repeat abuse cases · retention after claim

name: Google Shape;179;p5
text: Monthly calendar with Sales around paydays, sports events, holidays — planned, not reactive.
textPreview: Monthly calendar with Sales around paydays, sports events, holidays — planned, not reactive.

name: Google Shape;182;p5
text: Claim rate by timing window · planned vs reactive ratio
textPreview: Claim rate by timing window · planned vs reactive ratio

name: Google Shape;187;p5
text: Live view of promo volume, SLA, QC pass rate, automation issues, and campaign status for management.
textPreview: Live view of promo volume, SLA, QC pass rate, automation issues, and campaign status for management.

name: Google Shape;190;p5
text: Dashboard usage · report automation rate · decisions supported
textPreview: Dashboard usage · report automation rate · decisions supported

name: Google Shape;195;p5
text: Log every automation error and QC failure; review weekly; update rules so known issues never repeat.
textPreview: Log every automation error and QC failure; review weekly; update rules so known issues never repeat.

name: Google Shape;198;p5
text: Automation error rate · repeat-error reduction · QC first-pass rate
textPreview: Automation error rate · repeat-error reduction · QC first-pass rate

name: Google Shape;203;p5
text: After each campaign: objective, cost, claims, deposits, issues, and next action — shared with Sales.
textPreview: After each campaign: objective, cost, claims, deposits, issues, and next action — shared with Sales.

name: Google Shape;206;p5
text: % campaigns reviewed · action items done · repeat performance
textPreview: % campaigns reviewed · action items done · repeat performance

text: Initiatives 6–10: abuse control, calendar timing, dashboard, automation exception log, post-mortems. The exception log responds directly to June. Post-mortems close the loop so campaign learnings compound.

name: Google Shape;214;p6
text: Quick wins first, strategic plays in sequence
textPreview: Quick wins first, strategic plays in sequence

name: Google Shape;217;p6
text: July 2026   Current data and process. No new systems.
textPreview: July 2026   Current data and process. No new systems.

name: Google Shape;234;p6
text: August 2026   Needs Sales alignment or shared data.
textPreview: August 2026   Needs Sales alignment or shared data.

name: Google Shape;253;p6
text: Sep – Dec 2026   Needs integration, attribution, cross-team agreement.
textPreview: Sep – Dec 2026   Needs integration, attribution, cross-team agreement.

text: Sequencing logic: control and cleanup first (all seven Now items use existing data), campaign work once Sales alignment is in place, and revenue tracking last because it depends on a data-sharing agreement. Q2 items are deliberately not promised early.

name: Google Shape;272;p7
text: Start with objective, target segment, and timing; the remaining fields form the full campaign standard.
textPreview: Start with objective, target segment, and timing; the remaining fields form the full campaign standard.

name: Google Shape;276;p7
text: Reactivation, first deposit, cross-product, or retention — defines the mechanics.
textPreview: Reactivation, first deposit, cross-product, or retention — defines the mechanics.

name: Google Shape;280;p7
text: Activity, deposit range, platform. “All players” is not a segment.
textPreview: Activity, deposit range, platform. “All players” is not a segment.

name: Google Shape;284;p7
text: A list, or clear rules to generate one.
textPreview: A list, or clear rules to generate one.

name: Google Shape;288;p7
text: Deposit, log in, try a product — defines bonus type and turnover.
textPreview: Deposit, log in, try a product — defines bonus type and turnover.

name: Google Shape;292;p7
text: Cap or total budget, so amounts and TO are configured right.
textPreview: Cap or total budget, so amounts and TO are configured right.

name: Google Shape;296;p7
text: Earlier notice enables proper preparation, coordination, and QC.
textPreview: Earlier notice enables proper preparation, coordination, and QC.

name: Google Shape;300;p7
text: Sequence work correctly and flag conflicts early.
textPreview: Sequence work correctly and flag conflicts early.

name: Google Shape;304;p7
text: A shared definition of success to report against.
textPreview: A shared definition of success to report against.

name: Google Shape;308;p7
text: Who deposited, when, how much. Without this we cannot measure or improve.
textPreview: Who deposited, when, how much. Without this we cannot measure or improve.

text: The ask of Sales, framed constructively: nine inputs. Emphasise #9 — post-campaign result sharing is the single input that unlocks all revenue measurement. Numbers 1, 2 and 6 fix most of the rework today.

name: Google Shape;316;p8
text: Operational discipline, cost control, revenue signal
textPreview: Operational discipline, cost control, revenue signal

Claim-to-deposit rate
Deposit within 24/72h of claim

Avg deposit after promo

Revenue contribution
Where GGR/NGR is available

name: Google Shape;345;p8
text: Baselines set in Month 1.  Revenue metrics require post-campaign deposit data from Sales — directional until attribution is live (Phase 3). ROI cannot be substantiated without it.
textPreview: Baselines set in Month 1.  Revenue metrics require post-campaign deposit data from Sales — directional until attribution is live (Phase 3...

text: Three metric families. Operational metrics we can start measuring immediately; cost metrics as audits are approved; revenue metrics only become credible once Sales shares deposit data. Say clearly: no ROI claims until attribution is live.

Purpose of this slide: show management the risks are already understood and each has a concrete mitigation. Highlight the automation and overpromising rows — those two demonstrate self-awareness after June.

name: Google Shape;362;p10
text: Control-building first, pilots by week three
textPreview: Control-building first, pilots by week three

name: Google Shape;369;p10
text: Map internal vs Sales data sources
textPreview: Map internal vs Sales data sources

text: Realistic 30-day plan. Weeks 1–2 are alignment, audits and the dashboard skeleton; pilots only start week 3 once the quality gate and exception log exist. Week 4 ends with a management snapshot and a decision on what becomes monthly rhythm.

name: Google Shape;422;p11
text: If you only remember four things
textPreview: If you only remember four things

name: Google Shape;428;p11
text: QC and governance before promos go live
textPreview: QC and governance before promos go live

name: Google Shape;430;p11
text: Automation with control — not just speed
textPreview: Automation with control — not just speed

name: Google Shape;432;p11
text: Promo data and visibility for management
textPreview: Promo data and visibility for management

name: Google Shape;436;p11
text: Cap audit cuts over-capped bonus liability
textPreview: Cap audit cuts over-capped bonus liability

name: Google Shape;460;p11
text: Support two controlled pilots in week three
textPreview: Support two controlled pilots in week three

text: Closing summary — usable as the leave-behind. Four questions management will ask: value, cost, revenue, next step. Each answer is four lines.

name: Google Shape;472;p12
text: “Promo adds more value when we are involved in campaign structure, QC, cost control, and performance review — not just execution.”
textPreview: “Promo adds more value when we are involved in campaign structure, QC, cost control, and performance review — not just execution.”

name: Google Shape;474;p12
text: “June showed that speed without control creates risk. Our next focus is stronger QC, exception tracking, and dashboard visibility — before we scale further.”
textPreview: “June showed that speed without control creates risk. Our next focus is stronger QC, exception tracking, and dashboard visibility — befor...

name: Google Shape;476;p12
text: “The goal is not more promos. It is promos that are measurable, less wasteful, and connected to deposit behaviour.”
textPreview: “The goal is not more promos. It is promos that are measurable, less wasteful, and connected to deposit behaviour.”

name: Google Shape;478;p12
text: Volume → value.  That starts with clearer briefs from Sales and a post-campaign data-sharing agreement.
textPreview: Volume → value.  That starts with clearer briefs from Sales and a post-campaign data-sharing agreement.

name: Google Shape;479;p12
text: Promo Department · Value Creation Framework · July 2026
textPreview: Promo Department · Value Creation Framework · July 2026

text: Close with the ask: (1) agree the request template and campaign objectives, (2) commit to post-campaign deposit data sharing, (3) support the Now-phase audits. Everything else in the plan follows from those three.
